ChangeOrders.title: Additional Pipe Spool Insulation — Train A Bypass
ChangeOrders.description: Client requested insulation of 3 additional DN-150 bypass spools added to Train A during detailed engineering.

ChangeOrders.title: Weather Delay — 3-Day Scaffold Access Hold
ChangeOrders.description: 3-day work stoppage due to wind > 40 km/h on Levels 3/4. Affected scaffold on Compressor B north face.

ChangeOrders.title: Unforeseen Corrosion — Tank 9 Shell Extra Prep
ChangeOrders.description: Pitting corrosion found on 120 m² of shell. Required SSPC-SP10 + 2 coats CRC inhibitor before re-insulation.
ChangeOrders.reason: Unforeseen — corrosion not visible until insulation removed.

ChangeOrders.title: Heat Trace Integration — Compressor A Drain Lines
ChangeOrders.description: Client verbally requested heat trace insulation on 8 × DN-50 drain lines.

ChangeOrders.title: Demising Wall Rework — Tenant Spec Change
ChangeOrders.description: Tenant changed demising-wall spec mid-build to add fire-rated assembly. Required tear-out + rebuild on 18 lin m.

ChangeOrders.title: Additional Scaffold Bay
ChangeOrders.description: Process team added 4 additional access bays.

ChangeOrders.title: Substation Re-coating
ChangeOrders.description: Added re-coating of metal cabinets while access scaffold up.

ChangeOrders.title: Lighting Rework
ChangeOrders.description: Was scoping additional lighting; project cancelled before approval.

ChangeOrders.title: Schedule Compression — 2 Weeks
ChangeOrders.description: Owner requested 2-week schedule compression; OT premium.

ChangeOrders.title: Containment Footprint Expansion
ChangeOrders.description: Doubled containment footprint per safety review.

Schedule.taskDescription: Insulation install — Compressor A heat trace
Insulation install — Compressor B heat trace
Tank 9 prep (CONFLICT — same crew, same day)
Heater placement (eq.heat003 also at proj.northern.warehouse — conflict)

TimeEntries.rejectionReason: OT not on approved schedule. Resubmit with manager pre-approval.

MaterialRequests.notes: Mineral wool for Compressor B pipe insulation.

RFIs.title: Confirm Insulation Spec — 6" Steam Lines, Train A
RFIs.question: Drawing M-221 Rev 3 specifies 50 mm mineral wool; MTO-04 lists 65 mm calcium silicate. Please confirm.
RFIs.answer: Use 65mm calcium silicate per MTO-04. Drawing will be revised. No schedule impact.

RFIs.title: Pipe Support Spacing Conflict — Level 2
RFIs.question: Structural drawing S-108 Rev 2 shows 3000mm c/c support; SPEC-M-003 requires ≤2400mm. Cannot comply with both.

RFIs.title: Material Sub Request — BFW Lines
RFIs.question: Request to substitute calcium silicate with mineral wool on BFW lines.

RFIs.title: H2S Monitor Calibration Frequency
RFIs.question: H2S monitor calibration interval differs between SOP-06 and Owner-2A. Which governs?
RFIs.answer: Use Owner-2A every 8 hours. SOP-06 will be updated.

RFIs.title: Containment Footprint Boundary
RFIs.question: Confirm exact boundary of Phase 1 containment.

RFIs.title: Phase 2 Mobilization Date
RFIs.question: Phase 2 mobilization conflicting with owner shutdown.

RFIs.title: Scaffold Engineering Review
RFIs.question: Bay 4 scaffold over irregular flooring; needs engineered design.

RFIs.title: Demising Wall Spec Confirmation
RFIs.question: Tenant changed spec mid-build — confirm fire-rating requirement.

RFIs.title: Vapour barrier overlap — south wall
RFIs.question: As-built shows 100mm vapour barrier overlap, spec required 150mm. Accept as-is or remediate?

RFIs.title: Hot work permit timing
RFIs.question: Hot work permit 24h vs same day?
RFIs.answer: 24h advance, with field amendment allowed for emergency.

RFIs.title: Emergency containment edge sealing
RFIs.question: How to seal containment to active equipment?
RFIs.answer: Use approved sealant package — same as standard.

RFIs.title: Scaffold load test
RFIs.question: Need engineered load test results before sub mobilization.

Invoices.notes: Final draw — spray foam package complete.

LienWaivers.__notes: Final waiver sent; awaiting client signature.

DailyJobReports.workPerformed: Compressor A heat trace insulation. Inspection passed.
Scaffold erection — Compressor B south face.
Compressor B insulation continuing. Heat trace integration on 4 spool sections.
Heat trace + aluminum jacketing — Train B steam lines.
Phase 1 containment install. Hot work permit logged.
Process scaffold Bay 1 erected. Snow management.
Emergency mobilization. Containment install starts. Continuous shift 12hrs.
Containment seal complete. Roof patch coordinated.

Incidents.title: Tool dropped from Lvl 3 — near miss
Incidents.description: Worker dropped 3lb wrench from scaffold Lvl 3. No personnel below. Lanyard not used.
Incidents.correctiveActions: All crew issued tool lanyards. Pre-task checklist updated to include tool tethering verification.

Incidents.title: Minor cut — sheet metal handling
Incidents.description: Worker cut palm on sheet metal edge during install. Treated with first aid. Returned to work.
Incidents.correctiveActions: Reinforced cut-resistant glove policy. Site safety briefing.

Incidents.title: Slip on icy access — no injury
Incidents.description: Worker slipped on icy access stair. No injury. Stair de-iced.
Incidents.correctiveActions: Daily de-icing protocol added. Anti-slip mats deployed.

Incidents.title: Confined space air alarm
Incidents.description: H2S monitor alarmed during emergency containment. Crew exited. Levels normalized after 4 min.

Incidents.title: Strain — mat handling
Incidents.description: Worker reported back strain after mat handling. First aid + light duty.

Incidents.title: Hot work spark — extinguished
Incidents.description: Spark from grinder ignited stray fabric. Extinguished within 30s. No damage.
Incidents.correctiveActions: Hot work watch staffing increased to 2.

Incidents.title: Burn from heat trace handling
Incidents.description: Worker burned forearm on energized heat trace cable. Medical aid (clinic). Returned to work after 2 days.
Incidents.correctiveActions: Lockout protocol updated. Energized-cable handling SOP revised.

Safety_Records.findings: All crew briefed on hot work permit lead time.
Identified roof leak hazards; PPE upgrade.

MaterialSales.notes: Acoustic batt sold separately to project.
Fabric structure components quoted to Eagle Ridge.
